AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-09-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause call for petition for name and gender change.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Deborah Neville
Petitioner: Marie Chantel Ostwald
Alison Austin, Esq. appeared for Petitioner
Petitioner was sworn and examined.
The court grants decree changing name and gender to: Shawn Ostwald
Decree signed in open court.
